name: Your Solar CCT Sequence Name
description: Describe how this preset tracks the sun. For example: warm light at dawn/dusk, bright cool daylight at midday, with separate rising/setting curves.
author: YourGitHubUsername
notes: Explain the intended use case and your location/latitude context. Solar step fields: sun_elevation (-90 to 90 degrees), color_temp (1000-10000K), brightness (1-255), phase ('rising', 'setting', or 'any'). Values are interpolated between steps.
